sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29861" key="e(anhfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑᾰνηφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἑᾰνός, ὁ</etym>) <sense id="n29861.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing a thin robe</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἠώς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
